issues.description: Evidence bundle contains only 5 criteria_results entries when 6 acceptance criteria were specified. AC-006 (Pool pressure/ASSUM-004: 15 concurrent aput calls against pg_pool_max=10) is missing from the evidence bundle's criteria_results array. The bundle shows 'criteria_total': 5 instead of 6. Player claims test_pool_pressure_concurrent_operations passed, but this is not verified in the deterministic evidence.
issues.requirement: AC-006: Pool pressure (ASSUM-004) - verify psycopg-pool behavior under concurrent load
issues.suggestion: Investigate why the evidence gathering system only extracted 5 criteria instead of 6. Verify that test_pool_pressure_concurrent_operations exists, runs, and passes. Ensure the evidence bundle includes all 6 acceptance criteria in the next turn.

issues.description: Player report claims 6 orchestrator-managed files (coverage_integration.json, test_integration_output.txt, tests/integration/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_pool_lifecycle.py, tests/integration/test_store_semantics.py, tests/unit/test_app_lifespan.py) in files_modified or implementation_files that were not actually modified this turn. Honesty verification flagged 6 'should_fix' discrepancies.
issues.suggestion: Update the Player's report generator to filter orchestrator-managed paths (e.g., .guardkit/autobuild/, coverage*.json, test_*_output.txt) from files_modified, files_created, and implementation_files arrays. Only claim files the Player agent directly modified.

criteria_verification.notes: Evidence shows pytest command 'python -m pytest tests/integration/ -m integration -v --timeout=120' passed with 15 passed, 1 skipped in 23.65s. Seam test 'test_ephemeral_dsn_is_local_random_port' validates DSN is 127.0.0.1/localhost with port != 5432 and asserts no forbidden terms (synology, nas, 100.64.) in DSN.

Evidence shows test_round_trip_preserves_content_and_timestamps stores content via aput, retrieves via aget, asserts byte-identical value, and verifies created_at/updated_at are present and within 5 seconds of current time. Test passed.

Evidence shows two tests: (1) test_upsert_replaces_existing_record calls aput twice with same key, verifies only second version retrieved and exactly 1 record via asearch. (2) test_delete_removes_from_get_and_search verifies aget returns None and asearch finds 0 matches after adelete. Both passed.

Evidence shows test_semantic_search_ranking_with_real_embeddings stores pooling and holiday memories, calls asearch('how do we manage Postgres connections'), asserts pooling memory ranks first and all results have relevance data. Test uses real nomic embeddings fixture. SKIPPED when FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL not set (expected), but test code is complete and correct.

Evidence shows three tests: (1) test_pool_lifecycle_no_connection_leak verifies pg_stat_activity count restores to baseline after context exit (no leak). (2) test_store_setup_is_idempotent verifies second setup succeeds and data persists. (3) test_connection_timeout_behavior attempts connection to closed port 9999 with 2s timeout, verifies failure < 7s (timeout + slack) with TimeoutError and ASSUM-006 observation recorded. All passed.

Evidence ABSENT from bundle. The bundle contains only 5 criteria_results entries and shows 'criteria_total': 5. Player claims test_pool_pressure_concurrent_operations exists and verifies ASSUM-004 (15 concurrent operations against pool max 10 complete within 30s bound), but this evidence is not present in the deterministic evidence bundle. Cannot verify without evidence.

rationale: Cannot approve due to missing evidence for AC-006 in the deterministic evidence bundle. While overall test metrics show 15 passed/1 skipped and all quality gates passed, the absence-of-failure guard requires explicit evidence for each acceptance criterion. The evidence bundle extracted only 5 of 6 criteria. Additionally, 6 should_fix honesty discrepancies indicate the Player's report generator needs to filter orchestrator-managed paths from file-change claims.
